si.t: This page contains information you need to create, validate and upload your inventory file to Amazon. We recommend that you print this page so you can refer to it as you go.
Save a copy of this file as an Excel worksheet on your hard drive. Then proceed to enter your product data into the Template tab, using the guidelines below.
The Data Definitions tab contains the acceptable values that can be used as you fill out the Template tab. We recommend printing the Data Definitions sheet for reference.
The Data Definitions tab also indicates whether a field is Required or Optional:

r.t: Optional fields give customers product information that is useful, but not critical, when making purchasing decisions. We recommend that you provide as much Optional product data as possible for your product. In some cases, fields we have labelled Optional may be important to your product or business, or required according to your seller agreement.

si.t: How to complete your inventory template

As indicated in the Data Definitions tab, some fields require that you use terms from the Valid Values tab. These terms are specific to the product attribute and are used for categorisation and product discoverability – for example, via search.

The cell for Recommended Browse Nodes requires that you use a valid value from the Browse Tree Guide (BTG) for the category in which you are listing. BTG are category-specific and contain the rules that Amazon uses to assign products to categories on our site. These values are available as drop-downs in the Template tab and you can view the mappings for these values in the Browse Data tab.

The BTGs are also available as separate Excel files that can be downloaded from this page: https://sellercentral.amazon.in/gp/help/1641. These files map between the Recommended Browse Nodes and Amazon's controlled terms which allow products to be displayed in those categories. In the BTG for your category, find the category most appropriate for your product and then use the corresponding query to determine what field and value you need to put in your template to place your product in that category.
Refer to the Images tab for Amazon’s image standards. Images that you upload to Amazon must conform to these standards.
View full product image requirements here: https://sellercentral.amazon.in/gp/help/1881
For category specific guidelines, download the style guide for your category from the downloadable file template table here: https://sellercentral.amazon.in/gp/help/1641

The Template tab is where you will enter the information for your listings. The default template tab view will show the required, conditionally required and recommended attributes. Conditionally required attributes become required based on your inputs to the required attributes. Optional attributes are collapsed in each attribute group and you can expand the optional attributes by clicking the "+" or "-" signs at the top of the column. Alternatively, at the top left corner of the sheet, you can select "1" or "2" to collapse or expand all the optional attributes. Option "1" shows the default view, which collapses optional attributes and option "2" shows the advanced view, which expands all the attributes. The default view will not hide the first attribute in each group. For example, in the screenshot below, the "Style" attribute in the "Discovery" group is optional but not hidden. After selecting the desired Product Type for a row in the template, the required fields in that row will be highlighted in RED and conditionally required fields and recommended attributes are highlighted in ORANGE. Attributes that are not applicable to your Product Type will be greyed out in that row. We recommend that you provide all the applicable attributes in the default view first, such as highlighted cells, to prevent missing required attribute errors. For best results, also submit as much optional data as possible for your products. If you are not providing data for a particular non-required field, leave the cell blank. Feel free to add colour, bold, borders and other formatting (not additional text) to the template if it is helpful to you. Please note that high ASCII characters (such as ®, ©) and HTML tags are not allowed.

When you have finished entering your product data into the Template tab, you can save the entire workbook as an Excel file or save the Template tab (only) as a Text (tab-delimited) (*.txt) file (For the Chinese marketplace, save as Unicode Text (*.txt)): right-click on the Template tab, Move or Copy, select 'new book' and 'create a copy', now File, Save As and choose the correct File Format.
This is your inventory file that you will upload via the Add Products via Upload page in Seller Central.
Upload your file from the “Upload your spreadsheet” section of the Add Products via Upload page in Seller Central, here: https://sellercentral.amazon.in/listing/upload.

When you upload your file, our system will automatically validate your data file as it is submitted. When your submission is complete, you will be able to download a processing report. Any errors in the upload will appear in a Processing Report. This report can be downloaded from the “Spreadsheet upload status” section of the Add Products via Upload page in your seller account on Seller Central, here: https://sellercentral.amazon.in/listing/status.
Note: We recommend first uploading 15 or fewer products for testing purposes. You can upload the rest of your inventory once you have completed a successful test.

From time to time, Amazon will update valid values, data validation rules, explanatory text, and requirements. In the event that you submit an outdated template, we will generate an updated version on your behalf, with all your data pre-populated. You will see a link to "Download your submission in the updated template version" on the "Spreadsheet upload status" section of the Add Products via Upload page on Seller Central.
If you have read the Instructions or Data Definitions tabs of this file and still have questions, consult seller Help, starting with this page: https://sellercentral.amazon.in/gp/help/581

In order to improve the shopping experience for Customers, we are changing how we collect, categorise and display product data from Sellers. This includes the types of data that are required and optional.
What can I do to prepare for the change?
How will this affect me right now?
What types of changes will I see?

Every product on Amazon needs one or more product images. Choose images that are clear, straightforward and easy to understand. They must accurately represent the product, be information-rich and attractively presented. Show only the product that is being offered for sale, with minimal or no propping. Text, logos and inset images are not allowed. Whenever possible, provide several images, with each one showing different angles and details of the product. This is your opportunity to show your product to your customer, so quality matters.
We reserve the right to reject images that do not meet our image standards.
It is your responsibility to ensure that you have all necessary rights to the images you submit.
*The background for a MAIN image must be pure white (pure white blends in with the Amazon search and item detail pages, which have RGB values of 255,255,255).

*A MAIN image must not be a graphic or illustration and must not contain accessories that are not being dispatched with the product, props that may confuse the customer, text that is not part of the product, or any logos, watermarks or inset images.
*The product must fill 85% or more of the image.

*MAIN images should be supplemented with additional images showing different sides of a product, the product in use, or details that are not visible in the MAIN image. For media products, this could include the back cover, sample pages, or screenshots. You can add up to eight (8) images.

*A white background is recommended, but not required. Additional images may not include logos or watermarks, and all props or accessories must be presented in a way that will not cause customer confusion.

Images should be 1000 pixels or more in either height or width as this will enable the zoom function on the website (zoom has been proven to enhance sales). Files measuring less than 500 pixels on the longest side will be rejected by our system.
*Amazon accepts JPEG (.jpg), TIFF (.tif), or GIF (.gif) file formats (JPEG files are preferred as they are smaller in size and can therefore be processed and uploaded more quickly).

*A suggested way to name an image file is to save the image on your web server using the product SKU as the file name followed by the view type or variant code--MAIN, PT01-PT08 (additional images), SWCH (usually a colour swatch only used on products with more than one variation). Examples: 8845013515.MAIN.jpg, 8845013515.PT01.jpg, 8845013515.SWCH.jpg

You have two options to upload your image files: (1) Once you have named each image file and saved them to your drive folder, please compress the folder into a zip file. Submit the template without image attributes filled to create the offers on Amazon. Use the Processing Summary to confirm the products are created without errors. Then, proceed to the image upload tool (https://sellercentral.amazon.in/imaging/upload) to upload your images for the listed products. Without providing images, the SKU will not be searchable for customers. (2) Once you have named the image file and saved it to your web server, enter the URL of the image file in the appropriate cell of your product template.

It's important that an image is supplied for all products. Upload images by either providing the image URL or use the image upload tool (https://sellercentral.amazon.in/imaging/upload). If using the image upload tool, please submit the template first and then upload images. Until an image is supplied, the SKU will not be buyable. Please note that listing requests for existing ASINs on Amazon do not require submitting an image URL or uploading images.
⚠️ Important! This Product spreadsheet has changed.

Depending on the product category, you can expect to see: - New or updated attribute requirements for listing - New or updated attribute groupings - Updated attribute names
If you are a Business Seller, you will see updated labels for Amazon Business (B2B) specific attributes (E.g: Business Price will be referred as Your Price under 'Offer (Amazon Business)' field group)

You may continue to use the old spreadsheets until further notice. We will notify 30 days before the date from which you will no longer be able to upload the old spreadsheets to create or update listings. To provide updated product details, we recommend you to start using the new templates.
How will I know that I am generating the new spreadsheet?

Download a spreadsheet using the Add Products via Upload page as usual. When you select product categories and marketplaces supported by the new template, we will let you know that you are generating a new spreadsheet through a message alert before you generate the spreadsheet.

Download the new spreadsheets. Review the changes to the attributes so you know what to expect. Provide all new required attributes for all your listings. We recommend making these changes sooner to take advantage of additional features such as improved dropdown and conditional requirement highlights.

r.t: Required fields are the minimum attribute values necessary to create your product in the Amazon catalogue. Required cells will be highlighted in RED in the template once you have selected a Product Type for that row. Failure to enter a valid value in a required field will prevent your product from being added to the catalogue. Additional data may be required, depending on the values you enter elsewhere in this template. (For example, you must provide package_dimensions_unit_of_measure if you provide package length)

si.t: We have removed variation themes that are no longer relevant from the new version of the Product Spreadsheet template. These themes appeared with a “Deprecated: Do not use" tag in the dropdown options for the "Variation Theme Name" attribute in the template. This change does not affect your existing variation listings, which will continue to operate normally with no change in the customer experience. If you want to update your variations associated with those themes to use a new variation theme: (a) Delete the existing Parent SKU either using Manage Inventory or through a Category Listings Report (Inventory Reports → Category Listings Report). If you are using the Category Listings Report, identify the Parent SKU row and set Listing Action to “Delete” only for that row. Upload the file on the Spreadsheet tab in Add Products. Once you delete the Parent SKU, all Child SKUs will automatically become individual listings. (b) Use the same Category Listing Report to create a new Parent SKU using the most appropriate variation theme for your family that do not have a suffix “Deprecated: Do not use”. In the same step, update your Child SKUs to this new Parent SKU by filling in the Parentage Level, Parent SKU and Variation Theme Name. Upload the file on the Spreadsheet tab in Add Products.

Amazon has updated the grouping of 'Offer' attributes in order to improve multi-offer listing capability for Sellers catering to more than one buyer segment (such as Amazon Business). If you are an Amazon Business Seller, you will see separate offer grouping to set prices for intended buyer segments. You will see "Sell on Amazon" (to set standard customer prices) and "Amazon Business" (to set discounted business price) Offer groups. In the old spreadsheet, the discounted price for Amazon Business customers was called 'Business Price'. In the new spreadsheet, the business price is called as 'Your Price" under 'Offer - Amazon Business (B2B)' group. Quantity Discount attributes are also now available within the same group to simplify setting of quantity discounts for business offers.
This attribute indicates the SKU number as assigned by the contributor
Select the appropriate product type that best suits the item
Specify the type of operation to be actioned on the data provided
Specify whether a SKU is a parent or child
The SKU of the parent item
Specify the variation theme that the product will use. The theme's attributes must be populated for all items in the grouping.
Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing
Sony QuietComfort Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphones
Provide the brand name of the product
Select the type of external ID (barcode) type or ASIN that is being used to identify this product. If the product is exempt from external ID, select GTIN Exempt.
Provide the corresponding product id value based on the type that was selected

Indicate the browse node or section of the Amazon website where the product will be assigned. This allows customers to find the product on the website easily. If you don't provide a node or if you provide an incorrect node, customers may not be able to find your product.
Provide the manufacturer 's model number for the item
Provide the company that manufactures the product.
The UN specified purchasing/taxonomy code corresponding to the item
The URL where the main offer-specific image of the product is located.
The URL for additional images of your product. These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.
The URL where an image of a color swatch from the product is located

Provide a text description of the product. This information will appear in paragraph form on the detail page of your product. Include unique product features, product line details, and product specifications. Do not use all caps.
This summer, boots by Jette made from high quality suede leather are real gems. They visually highlight the craftsmanship and fine leather braid positioned at the top of the shaft

Brief descriptive text, called out via a bullet point, regarding a specific aspect of the product. These display directly under or next to your product photo, it is useful to put interesting information in these fields. Do NOT use all caps or abbreviations. Please do NOT use for fabric content, care instructions or country as these are populated in different fields.
Provide any terms that may be relevant to customer searches. No repetition, no competitor brand names or ASINs.
Water sport shoes; Derek Rose; Electric; Wi-Fi; Banana
Provide the style of the product. Style refers to the aesthetic choices of a person or a group of people. It describes the distinctive visual representation of a product
Provide the total number of identical items in the selling unit to the customer
Select from the list or provide a customer-facing one to two-word phrase that describes the type of item the product is.
Provide the color of the product
Provide the size of the item
Provide the part number. For many products, this will be identical to the model number however some manufacturers distinguish part number from model number
Provide the contact information (including address, zipcode) for the product's manufacturer
Manufacturer Name ltd., Street No. 24/4, New Delhi, India - 110011, Contact: +91-801-000-2400, service@manufacturer.com
Provide the phone models this product is compatible with

For products that are consumed by volume, weight, linear dimension, etc., provide the net quantity that would be shipped to a customer who orders one ASIN (e.g. 12 pack of 6 floz. bottles of water = 72, vs. a single 2 liter bottle = 2). For products consumed as individual units, provide the total number of units (pack of 12 pens = 12). For packed assortments of non-identical items, enter 1
For items consumed by volume, weight, linear dimension etc., provide the unit of measure listed on the products. For products consumed as individual units, enter: count

Provide the date the product launches and should first be shown on the Amazon website (YYYY-MM-DD format). PSLD does not impact buyability or pre-order logic, it is used to indicate when a product will be visible and searchable on the Amazon website
Specify the items that are included with this product
Store external product entity information. "HSN" for India marketplace.
Store external product information for a given key. For example 6 to 8-digit HSN for India marketplace.
Provide the mechanism used to control the item for standard operations.
Provide the contact information (including address, zipcode) of the importer of the product. The Importer is the person who brings the product into a country for sale
Importer Name ltd., Street No. 24/4, New Delhi, India - 110011, Contact: +91-111-000-2400, service@importer.com
Provide the contact information (including address, zipcode) for the packer of the product. The packer is the person who does the primary pre-packaging of the product when it is not the manufacturer.
Packer Name ltd., Street No. 24/4, New Delhi, India - 110011, Contact: +91-221-000-2400, service@packer.com
Provide whether the products meets environmental impact reduction criteria established under Japan's Green Purchasing Law
Please indicate whether the offer should be skipped and a buyable offer should not be created. A value of "Yes", means no offer will be created.
Provide the actual condition type of the product
Provide descriptive text explaining the actual condition of the item
Small dent in left side panel.
Enter the product tax code supplied to you by Amazon.com
Provide the merchant release date using YYYY-MM-DD format
Provide the maximum number of units of the item that can be purchased in a single order.
If you can print a gift message with the item indicate that here. If left blank, defaults to 'No'
If you can gift wrap an item indicate that here. If left blank, defaults to 'No'
The URL where the main offer-specific image of the product is located
Provide the type of accessory included in the non-new product.
Provide the battery health information of the non-new product if it includes batteries.
Provide the overall cosmetic condition of the non-new product.
Provide the refurbishment type of the non-new product.
Provide the functional condition of the non-new product.
Provide the packaging type of the non-new product
Provide the information on how the non-new product was sourced.
For those merchants using Amazon fulfillment services, this designates which fulfillment network will be used. Specifying a value other than DEFAULT will cancel the Merchant-fulfilled offering.
Enter the quantity of the item you are making available for sale. This is your current inventory commitment (as a whole number)
Provide the time, in days, between when you receive an order for an item and when you can ship the item
Date that product will be restocked

Always available inventory is an alternative to quantity that allows inventory to never deplete. Enabling or disabling will toggle this feature on or off. Note that a quantity cannot be specified when provided.
Your Price INR (Sell on Amazon, IN)
Provide base price of the item at which it is being offered to the intended buyer segment (Sell on Amazon)
Maximum Retail Price (Sell on Amazon, IN)

Provide the maximum retail price that is physically printed on pre-packaged products by manufacturer according to legal metrology act. This is the maximum price that seller can charge a customer. This is only applicable to IN Marketplace. (Sell on Amazon)
The pricing rule that will automate price on this offer (Sell on Amazon)
Minimum Seller Allowed Price (Sell on Amazon, IN)
Provide the minimum seller allowed price (Sell on Amazon)
Maximum Seller Allowed Price (Sell on Amazon, IN)
Provide the maximum seller allowed price (Sell on Amazon)
Sale Price INR (Sell on Amazon, IN)
The price at which you offer the product for sale. (Sell on Amazon)
Sale Start Date (Sell on Amazon, IN)
The date that the sale price will begin to override the product's standard price; the sale price will be displayed after 0:00AM of Sale From Date. (Sell on Amazon)
Sale End Date (Sell on Amazon, IN)
The last date that the sale price will override the item's standard price; the product's standard price will be displayed after 0:00AM of Sale End Date. (Sell on Amazon)
Offering Release Date (Sell on Amazon, IN)
Your price start date (Sell on Amazon)
Stop Selling Date (Sell on Amazon, IN)
Your price end date (Sell on Amazon)
Provide base price of the item at which it is being offered to the intended buyer segment (Amazon Business (B2B))

Provide the maximum retail price that is physically printed on pre-packaged products by manufacturer according to legal metrology act. This is the maximum price that seller can charge a customer. This is only applicable to IN Marketplace. (Amazon Business (B2B))
Minimum Seller Allowed Price (Amazon Business (B2B), IN)
Provide the minimum seller allowed price (Amazon Business (B2B))
Maximum Seller Allowed Price (Amazon Business (B2B), IN)
Provide the maximum seller allowed price (Amazon Business (B2B))
Provide whether the quantity price type is fixed, a price set in local currency for each quantity threshold, or a percentage of business price (Amazon Business (B2B))
Quantity Threshold (Lower Bound, Amazon Business (B2B), IN)
Provide the minimum purchase quantity necessary to receive the discount. It will apply to all units if the quantity threshold is met. (Amazon Business (B2B))
Quantity Price (Fixed Price/Percentage Discount, Amazon Business (B2B), IN)
Provide the quantity price for each quantity threshold or the discount percentage offered on the business price for each quantity threshold. (Amazon Business (B2B))
Shipping Templates define your shipping regions and fees. Amazon assigns a default template, which you can modify or configure additional templates in your Shipping Settings.
Heavy Bulky Products, NCR Large Appliance Delivery
Provide the item length as a numeric value.
Select the unit of measure for Item Length. If a value is provided for Item Length, you must also enter the corresponding unit.
Provide the item width as a numeric value.
Select the unit of measure for Item Width. If a value is provided for Item Width, you must also enter the corresponding unit.
Provide the item height as a numeric value.
Select the unit of measure for Item Height. If a value is provided for Item Height, you must also enter the corresponding unit.
Provide the package length as a numeric value.
Select the unit of measure for Package Length. If a value is provided for Package Length, you must also enter the corresponding unit.
Provide the package width as a numeric value.
Select the unit of measure for Package Width. If a value is provided for Package Width, you must also enter the corresponding unit.
Provide the package height as a numeric value.
Select the unit of measure for Package Height. If a value is provided for Package Height, you must also enter the corresponding unit.
This attribute represents the weight of the item plus the packaging. If your item is shipped to the customer in multiple packages, enter the dimensions of the heaviest package
Select the unit of measure for Package Weight. If a value is provided for Package Weight, you must also enter the corresponding unit.
Provide the number of boxes that the product will be shipped in
Select the product's country of origin
Provide a description of the product's warranty
Select "yes" if batteries are required to power the item (or if the item is a battery) or "no" if they are not. Please note that an internal rechargeable battery is also considered a battery

Select "yes" if batteries are contained in the product (e.g. batteries inside a pair of Bluetooth headphones) and/or included with the product (e.g. batteries packed separately with a camera), otherwise select "no"
Select the chemical composition of the battery cell
Battery Cell Composition Other Than Listed
Provide the components of the item's battery cell that are not already listed under battery cell composition.
Provide the total net weight (numeric value) of the batteries included. This is the weight of the standalone batteries not including packaging or the device it may be used in.
Specify the number of batteries needed to power the item. If batteries are included with the item be sure to account for spare batteries provided
Provide battery type needed to power the item, including spares if included. Some options may be moved under other attribute eg. IEC code
Specify the total number of Lithium Metal cells in the product where the cell isn't contained in an encased battery (e.g. coin cells)
Specify the total number of Lithium-ion cells in the product where the cell isn't contained in an encased battery. For example, an AA battery is considered a cell
Provide the total energy stored in the lithium batteries used to power the item, measured in Watt Hours.

Select “in equipment” if the battery is contained in the item . Select “with equipment” if the battery is packed separately with the device it is meant to power. Select “only” if the product is a battery sold alone or with items it is not meant to power.
Batteries contained in equipment, Batteries packed with equipment, Batteries only
Provide the weight of lithium contained in the cell or battery as a numeric value
Provide the regulations that apply to the item if it is classified as a dangerous good, hazardous material, substance, or waste.

Select the GHS Class of the product from the list of valid values if GHS is selected as the Dangerous Goods Regulation. GHS Class indicates the warning statement assigned by the GHS classification system.
Select the aspect or regulatory body used for the hazardous product information
Provide hazmat information that is relevant to the product based on the aspect selected
Safety Data Sheet (SDS or MSDS) URL
Provide the web address for the Safety Data Sheet, containing essential safety information for potentially hazardous materials.
Provide the item weight numeric value (not including the packaging)
Is This Product Subject To Buyer Age Restrictions
Provide whether the product is subject to buyer age restrictions. These can influence the purchase and/or delivery of the product.
Provide the regulatory identification associated with the regulation type.
Responsible Person's Email or Electronic Address
Provide the email address or URL for the EU Responsible Person, representing the product in compliance with EU regulations.
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Application Guide)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Application Guide)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Certificate of Analysis)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Certificate of Analysis)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Certificate of Compliance)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Certificate of Compliance)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Compatibility Guide)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Compatibility Guide)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Data Act Transparency Declaration)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Data Act Transparency Declaration)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Emergency Use Authorization)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Emergency Use Authorization)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Emergency Use Authorization Amendment)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Emergency Use Authorization Amendment)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Installation Manual)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Installation Manual)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Instructions for Use)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Instructions for Use)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Patient Fact Sheet)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Patient Fact Sheet)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Product Certificate of Conformity)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Product Certificate of Conformity)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Provider Fact Sheet)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Provider Fact Sheet)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Safety Data Sheet)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Safety Data Sheet)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Safety Information)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Safety Information)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Specification Sheet)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Specification Sheet)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, Troubleshooting Guide)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Troubleshooting Guide)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, User Guide)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, User Guide)
Compliance Media Source Location (en_IN, User Manual)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, User Manual)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Warranty)
Check “yes” if your product doesn’t have any warning and safety information, as it can be used safely and as intended without it.
Provide the email or URL of the manufacturer. If you’ve submitted this information for the brand before, use the same email or URL.
Provide whether the item can be shipped globally by Amazon
Provide the GHS chemical hazard codes for the chemical substance/mixture in order to display warnings to customers.
Provide the time period within which the warranty can be availed for the base product.
Base Product Warranty Manufacturer Period Unit
Provide the corresponding unit used to designate the item's base product manufacturer warranty period.
Base Product Manufacturer Warranty Terms and Conditions
Provide the terms and conditions associated with the warranty provided by the manufacturer for the product.
This warranty is non-transferable and applies only to the original purchaser of the product.
Provide the steps to be followed to avail manufacturing warranty.
Apply for warranty claim on our website.
Provide the contact details (e-mail and phone number) of the warranty service provider.
Provide the name of the specific part for which the warranty duration is different from base warranty.
Provide the time period for which the warranty coverage is valid for the specific part or component of the product.
Provide the corresponding unit used to designate the duration of the warranty for the specific part or component of the product.
Provide the terms and conditions associated with the warranty provided by the manufacturer for the specific part.
This warranty is non-transferable and applies only to the specific part of the product.
Amazon Specific No Label With Warning
Electronics > Accessories > Mobile Accessories > Gaming Accessories > Finger Sleeves (21529686031)
Car & Motorbike > Car & Vehicle Electronics > Accessories > Mobile Phone Accessories > Kits (1389408031)
Electronics > Accessories > Mobile Accessories > Photo & Video Accessories > Flashes & Selfie Lights (11180538031)
Car & Motorbike > Car & Vehicle Electronics > Accessories > Mobile Phone Accessories (1389406031)
Electronics > Accessories > Mobile Accessories > Maintenance, Upkeep & Repairs > SIM Card Tools & Accessories (21529693031)
Electronics > Accessories > Mobile Accessories > UV Phone Steriliser Boxes (21701662031)
Electronics > Accessories > Mobile Accessories > Gaming Accessories (21529670031)
